<noinclude>

Params:

* Curator
* Curated date

The template displays the curation values and sets the properties. If empty or no values are passed it will use "Page creator" and "Creation date" semantic properties of a page instead.

</noinclude><includeonly>

'''Curated date:''' {{FieldTooltip|Curated date}} [[Curated date::{{#if:{{{Curated date|}}}|{{{Curated date}}}|{{#time:Y/m/d|{{#show:{{CURRENTFULLPAGENAME}}|?Creation date}}}}}}]]

'''Curator:''' {{FieldTooltip|Curator}} {{#if:{{{Curator|}}}|[[Curator::{{{Curator}}}| ]][[:User:{{{Curator}}}|{{{Curator}}}]]|{{#show:{{CURRENTFULLPAGENAME}}|?Page creator}}[[Curator::{{#replace:{{#show:{{CURRENTFULLPAGENAME}}|?Page creator|link=none}}|User:|}}| ]]}}

'''Revision editor(s):''' {{FieldTooltip|Revision editor}} {{DisplayRevisionEditors}}

<includeonly>
